narrative:
Precinct Rush Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 545 registered voters, with 63.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
